name: hostech-fullstack
description: Hostech Property Management System - Monorepo Runner

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontendV2Hostech && cd backend && composer install
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:v2" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:reverb"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev:v2" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:reverb" "npm run dev:queue"
scripts.backend:clear: cd backend && php artisan cache:clear && php artisan config:clear && php artisan route:clear
